basic_details.job_title: East Coast Railway – Junior Engineer (OP) – 1 Posts
basic_details.short_information: East Coast Railway Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Junior Engineer (OP). Candidates with B.e/B.Tech or Diploma Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 10-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through East Coast Railway official website rrcbbs.org.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree or Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering or ITI/ACT Apprenticeship Pass or 10+2 in Science Stream.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for East Coast Railway Junior Engineer (OP) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: East Coast Railway Junior Engineer (OP) Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
